source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT  [PayLines_id]
      ,[comment]
      ,[entry_type]
      ,[variant]
      ,[user_id]
      ,[duration_in_minutes]
      ,[start_datetime]
      ,CAST([start_datetime] AS DATE) AS [start_date]
      ,[end_datetime]
      ,CAST([end_datetime] AS DATE) AS [end_date]
      ,[is_sleep]
      ,[shift_id]
      ,[pay_type]
      ,[rate_of_pay_id]
      ,TRY_CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(rate, '£', ''), ',', '') AS decimal(10,2)) AS rate
      ,[rate_of_pay_pay_type]
  FROM [Sona].[STG_PayLines]
